title: Mammea sanguinea
taxonomy: Mammea sanguinea is classified within the family Melastomataceae. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species. The genus Mammea is part of the order Myrtales. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary history and diversity of the Melastomataceae family.
